title: ANORA
logline: A Brooklyn sex worker's impulsive Vegas marriage to a Russian oligarch's son spirals into chaos when his family arrives to forcibly annul it, trapping her in a desperate all-night search across New York.
protagonist: Ani (Anora), a 23-year-old stripper/sex worker navigating survival and sudden wealth
antagonistOrConflict: Toros and the Zakharov family's enforcers who seek to erase Ani's marriage; Ivan's cowardice and privilege
tone: Frenetic, raw, darkly comedic with underlying pathos—oscillates between fairy tale fantasy and brutal reality
themes: The illusion of the American Dream

actBreaks.description: The Vegas wedding chapel marriage marks the end of the fantasy—Ani believes she's escaped her life, but this act triggers the family's intervention.

validation.ruling: Scene #87 (p38, 27.5%) functions as Act 1 break: Ani and Ivan impulsively get married in a Las Vegas wedding chapel, an irreversible decision that fundamentally transforms the story from transactional sex work to high-stakes marriage conflict and forces Ani into entirely new territory she cannot retreat from.

actBreaks.description: Ivan is discovered at Headquarters and flees again, extending the nightmare search and cementing Ani's realization that her marriage is a sham.

validation.ruling: Scene #153 (p83, 60%) functions as Act 2 break: After the violent mansion confrontation, Ani reluctantly joins the crew's search for Ivan, marking the shift from captive to reluctant collaborator and setting up the final act's hunt through Brooklyn that will lead to the climactic confrontation and revelation.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: Baker constructs a deceptive three-act fairy tale that collapses into sustained chaos. Act One (scenes 1-87, ~38 pages) establishes Ani's strip club grind, her meet-cute with wealthy Ivan, and the whirlwind week culminating in their impulsive Vegas marriage—a Cinderella fantasy. Act Two (scenes 88-153, ~67 pages) is where the script reveals its true nature: a pressure-cooker hostage drama as Toros and his enforcers storm the mansion, physically restrain Ani, and drag her across Brooklyn hunting for the runaway groom. This act is relentless—107 scene breaks maintains breathless momentum. The extended mansion confrontation (scenes 69-111) is the script's volcanic center. Act Three (scenes 154-184, ~33 pages) accelerates into the climactic Headquarters sequence, the Vegas annulment trip, and a devastating coda that strips away all illusion. The structure mirrors Ani's experience: brief euphoria, prolonged captivity and humiliation, then hollow resolution.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing is deliberately bipolar. The opening 38 pages move fluidly through montage and episodic vignettes (average 1.2 pages per scene), establishing rhythm through repetition—lap dances, sex scenes, party sequences. Once Toros arrives (scene 107, page 68), the script downshifts into real-time chaos: the 11-page mansion standoff is unbroken intensity. The Brooklyn search (scenes 118-153) sustains frenetic energy through rapid location changes—vape shop, Tatiana's, boardwalk, clubs, diner—each scene clocking under 2 pages. The Headquarters climax (scenes 153-200) explodes across 7 pages of continuous action. Baker uses scene fragmentation as a tension device: 235 scenes in 138 pages means constant cutting, no rest, mirroring Ani's exhaustion and entrapment.

incitingIncident.description: Ivan reveals he must return to Russia at month's end and jokes about marrying an American to stay, suggesting Ani, and she tells him not to mess around.
incitingIncident.sceneHeading: 57 INT. CAESAR’S PALACE - PENTHOUSE - BEDROOM - MINUTES LATER. 57 57

validation.ruling: Scene #9 is just another routine lap dance with no story disruption. Scene #86 (p36, 26%) is the true inciting incident: Ivan reveals he must return to Russia at month's end and proposes marriage to Ani to stay in America, shattering her status quo and establishing the central conflict that drives the entire narrative.

midpoint.description: Toros enters the destroyed mansion to find Garnik with a dumpling bag on his face, Igor restraining Ani on the couch, and no Ivan; after learning Ivan ran away on foot and Ani broke Garnik's nose, Toros interrogates Ani about the marriage, she insists it's real and they had sex, Toros offers her ten thousand dollars to annul it, and Ani refuses and demands one million dollars.

validation.ruling: Scene #107 shows an elevator ride with no transformation. Scene #145 (p103, 75%) is the midpoint: Ani shifts from reactive victim to proactive agent by convincing Toros to let her help find Ivan, marking her point of no return as she commits to fighting for the marriage rather than passively accepting annulment.

climax.description: Toros drags Ivan out by the collar threatening him while Ani tries to tell Ivan she loves him; Diamond follows them through the club hurling insults at Ani, mocking her for bragging about the marriage and revealing that Ivan told her he was going back to Russia and just wanted one last bang.
climax.sceneHeading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM / THROUGH CLUB - CONTINUOUS 155.1

validation.ruling: Scene #195 is the discovery/confrontation setup but not peak tension. Scene #198 (p111, 80%) is the climax: Toros drags Ivan out while Ani desperately declares her love, and Diamond delivers the devastating revelation that Ivan told her he was returning to Russia and just wanted 'one last bang,' resolving the story question and completing Ani's arc from delusion to painful truth.

scenes.heading: 1 INT. HEADQUARTERS (MANHATTAN) - NIGHT 1 1
scenes.summary: The camera establishes Headquarters, a busy Manhattan gentlemen's club filled with dancers, clients, security, and staff, with music blasting and various areas for different types of interactions.

scenes.turningPointNote: Ani meets Ivan for the first time and gives him her contact information, initiating their relationship outside the club.

scenes.heading: 10 INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT 10 10
scenes.summary: Ani gives Ivan a dirty lap dance in a private room; Ivan places multiple hundred-dollar bills in her bikini strap, and she escalates by removing her top and allowing him to touch her breasts before he offers a fourth bill.

scenes.heading: 11 INT. HEADQUARTERS - UPSTAIRS COUCHES - NIGHT 11 11
scenes.summary: Ani and Ivan lounge on a couch upstairs, do a shot of vodka together toasting in Russian, and Ani gives Ivan her phone number by entering her contact into his phone.

scenes.heading: 12 INT. SUBWAY CAR - DAWN 12 12
scenes.summary: Ani rides the subway alone at dawn, barely staying awake, and arrives at the Brighton Beach train station.

scenes.heading: 13 EXT. SUBWAY STATION - DAWN 13 13
scenes.summary: Ani exits the subway station as five commuters in business attire enter.

scenes.heading: EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH AVENUE - EARLY MORNING A14

scenes.heading: EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH AVENUE - EARLY MORNING B14
scenes.summary: Ani approaches her apartment building and walks up the front steps.

scenes.summary: Ani's Uber arrives at Ivan's huge waterfront mansion; she tells the day guard she's there for Ivan Zakharov, and he confirms her name on his iPad and opens the gate.

scenes.summary: Ani walks through the gate to the mansion, rings the doorbell, and Ivan answers with boyish excitement and welcomes her inside.

scenes.heading: 17 INT. MANSION - FOYER - CONTINUOUS 17 17

scenes.summary: Ani and Ivan enter the master bedroom; she admires the view while he ogles her body, then she asks what he's looking for and he says special sex, so she removes her clothes, pushes him onto the bed seated, and begins performing oral sex on him.

scenes.heading: 20 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - SECONDS LATER 20 20
scenes.summary: Ani and Ivan have sex with Ivan moving like a jackrabbit while Ani is slightly amused by his boyish enthusiasm and lack of finesse.

scenes.heading: 21 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - LATER 21 21
scenes.summary: Ivan dabs and points to a large cash tip on the bedside table for Ani; they smoke together and talk while a TV rises from the console, and Ani learns Ivan is 21, lives off his father's money, and his parents are in Russia while he's supposed to be studying at NYU.

scenes.heading: 22 INT. HEADQUARTERS - LOCKER ROOM - NIGHT 22 22
scenes.summary: Lulu looks at Ani's phone with her jaw dropped as Ani happily reveals she's seeing Ivan again tomorrow; Diamond eavesdrops and makes a snide comment, then slowly slurps her drink while staring at Ani before Dawn enters.

scenes.summary: Wearing lingerie and heels, Ani crawls across Ivan's living room floor giving an erotic stage-style dance, then crawls up onto the couch where Ivan sits and removes her top.

scenes.summary: Ivan compliments Ani's performance and plays video games while dabbing; he invites her to his New Year's party, and she says she might have to work but asks if she can bring someone, and he agrees as long as it's not a guy.

scenes.heading: INT. UBER BACKSEAT - NIGHT A25
scenes.summary: Ani and Lulu have fun being mischievous and doing bumps of cocaine in the backseat of an Uber.

scenes.heading: 25 EXT. MILL BASIN - STREET - NIGHT 25 25
scenes.summary: Ani and Lulu exit an Uber dressed in skimpy party clothes in freezing weather; a mansion bouncer and night guard check them in as they hear pulsing bass and see partyers in all the windows, and Lulu reacts in awe.

scenes.heading: 26 EXT. MANSION - DOORWAY - NIGHT 26 26
scenes.summary: Ani and Lulu approach the front door with music pounding; Lulu whispers for Ani to adjust her breasts, and Ani does so just as the door opens and two guys exit with drinks.

scenes.summary: Ani and Lulu enter the packed mansion party; Ivan spots Ani while trying to DJ, makes a beeline for them, and charmingly introduces himself to Lulu by kissing her hand on one knee.

scenes.summary: Ivan acts as king of the party with his friends Tom and Aleks; he helps the girls take shots from an ice sculpture, and Aleks recognizes Ani from the club and introduces his girlfriend Dasha.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - NIGHT - LATER A29
scenes.summary: Out of earshot of Ani and Lulu, Dasha asks Aleks in Russian how he knows them, and he tells her that Ani is the escort Ivan is sleeping with.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - NIGHT- LATER B29
scenes.summary: Ivan leads a drinking game while Ani and Lulu watch him and have a great time.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - NIGHT - LATER C29
scenes.summary: Ani dances with Lulu, putting the other dancers to shame; Lulu screams asking if Ivan has a brother, and Ani wishes her happy New Year.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - THIRD FLOOR - LATER D29
scenes.summary: Ani and Lulu explore the third floor of the mansion.

scenes.heading: 29 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - LATER 29 29
scenes.summary: In the family room with music blasting and disco lights pulsating, Ani, Lulu, Ivan and his entourage drink and use drugs on a large couch; Crystal jumps on Ivan trying to make out with him, but he pushes her away saying he's taken and introduces Ani, and Crystal awkwardly exits.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVING ROOM - LATER A30
scenes.summary: The Times Square ball drop plays on TV and Aleks alerts everyone it's almost midnight; Toros and Garnik monitor the party from the kitchen with arms crossed, and Toros tells Aleks to get off the couch, then the countdown begins with kids screaming.

scenes.heading: 30 INT. MANSION - BALCONY - LATER 30 30
scenes.summary: The crowd watches fireworks lighting up the NYC skyline from the balcony; Tom passes around champagne, and Ivan and his friends shoot roman candles off the balcony with Ani and Lulu joining in.

scenes.summary: Ani rides on top of Ivan in the master bedroom; Toros knocks and asks in Russian if Ivan is good as they're leaving, and Ivan dismisses him saying he's busy, then Ani continues after confirming everything is fine.

scenes.summary: On New Year's Day afternoon, Ani wakes at 5 PM and starts dressing for work; Ivan wakes and asks her to stay, then proposes she be exclusive with him for the week for fifteen thousand dollars, and after negotiating she agrees and gets back into bed.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan offers Ani $15,000 to be exclusive with him for a week, and she accepts, establishing a paid arrangement that will drive the story forward.

scenes.turningPointNote: The marriage happens — the fairy tale moment that will soon collide with brutal reality and set the entire second act in motion.

scenes.turningPointNote: The Zakharov parents discover the marriage — the fairy tale shatters as the family's enforcers are activated, launching the central conflict.

scenes.summary: Garnik and Igor drive to the Zakharov mansion discussing a tabloid photo of Ivan with a girl rumored to be a prostitute, with Garnik worried about consequences while Igor dismisses it as tabloid nonsense.

scenes.summary: Garnik and Igor exit their car in the cold and ring the doorbell at the mansion.

scenes.summary: Ivan and Garnik take the elevator to the third floor while Ivan fumes and insults Garnik.
scenes.turningPointNote: The marriage is about to be confirmed to Toros and the Zakharov family, setting the central conflict in motion.

scenes.summary: Ani sits uncomfortably on the couch with Igor, who introduces himself; Ani tells him she is Ivan's wife.

scenes.heading: INT. ARMENIAN CHURCH - BACKROOM - DAY A82
scenes.summary: Toros runs into the church backroom, calls Ivan's parents to confirm the marriage is true, and pulls the phone away from his ear as they scream at him.

scenes.heading: 82 INT. MANSION - LIVING ROOM - DAY 82 82
scenes.summary: Ani tells Garnik and Igor they work for Ivan and should leave when he tells them to.

scenes.heading: 83 INT. ARMENIAN CHURCH - BACKROOM - DAY 83 83
scenes.summary: Toros continues his phone call with the Zakharovs, confirming he's seen the marriage license and promising to fix the situation immediately despite their screaming; they insist on coming themselves.

scenes.heading: 84 INT. MANSION - DOORWAY/FOYER - DAY 84 84
scenes.summary: Ivan pushes Garnik and Igor toward the door while Ani stands with arms crossed; Garnik delays politely while Ivan threatens to have his father fire Garnik.

scenes.heading: INT. ARMENIAN CHURCH - NAVE - DAY A85
scenes.summary: Toros storms out of the church in his winter coat, apologizing for the emergency and telling his wife it's about Ivan, leaving her incredulous.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - DOORWAY/FOYER - DAY B85
scenes.summary: Garnik's phone rings with a call from Toros and he answers it.

scenes.heading: 85 EXT. ARMENIAN CHURCH - FRONT STEPS - DAY 85 85
scenes.summary: Toros storms out of the church and screams into his phone for Garnik to put him on speaker so the hooker can hear.

scenes.heading: 86 INT. MANSION - FOYER - DAY 86 86
scenes.summary: Ani objects to being called a hooker while Ivan defends her as an erotic dancer; Toros on speakerphone berates Ivan in Russian for marrying a whore, and Ani angrily insists she's not a whore.

scenes.heading: EXT. CHURCH - PARKING LOT - CONTINUOUS A87
scenes.summary: Toros jumps into his Escalade and tells Ivan over the car speakers that his parents are on their way and they're meeting tomorrow at noon to take him back to St. Petersburg; Ivan panics and runs upstairs to pack while Ani tries to stop him and Toros screams not to let him leave.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan's parents are coming to forcibly take him back to Russia, escalating the stakes to maximum and triggering Ivan's flight response.

scenes.heading: 88 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 88 88
scenes.summary: Toros races down the street while hearing the commotion through his car speaker and orders Garnik not to let Ivan leave.

scenes.heading: 89 INT. MANSION - LIVING ROOM/FOYER - DAY 89 89
scenes.summary: Ivan grabs his phone and hits the gate button to leave; Ani asks what's happening and tries to follow but Igor blocks her way while Ivan exits, leaving Ani behind.

scenes.heading: 90 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 90 90
scenes.summary: Toros freaks out on speakerphone, hearing Ivan say goodbye and demanding they get him.

scenes.heading: 91 INT. MANSION - FOYER - DAY 91 91
scenes.summary: Garnik runs after Ivan while Igor blocks Ani from following; when Igor grabs her shoulder to stop her, Ani swings at him.

scenes.heading: 92 INT. MANSION - DRIVEWAY - CONTINUOUS 92 92
scenes.summary: Ivan runs through the open gate while Garnik chases him but slips on ice and falls.

scenes.heading: 93 INT. MANSION - FOYER/FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS 93 93
scenes.summary: Ani swings at Igor again, this time cutting his cheek with her wedding ring; she grabs a menorah and throws it at him, shattering a painting, then Igor leaps the couch and tackles her to the floor in a violent struggle.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 94 94
scenes.summary: Toros hears Ani's screaming through the car speaker and asks what's happening.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 95 95
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor crash into furniture, toppling and shattering vases, a lamp, and a candle holder as Ani fights wildly against Igor's attempts to subdue her.

scenes.heading: 96 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 96 96
scenes.summary: Toros hears the screaming and commotion through his car speaker and yells asking if they're killing her.

scenes.heading: 97 EXT. MANSION/STREET - DAY 97 97
scenes.summary: Garnik chases Ivan down the street but gives up and limps back to the mansion; the security guard asks if everything is okay and comments on Ivan having a tantrum.

scenes.heading: 98 INT. MANSION - FOYER/FAMILY ROOM - DAY 98 98
scenes.summary: Igor pins Ani on the couch, grabs the landline phone, and ties her wrists with the phone cord while she screams and struggles; Garnik enters and Igor asks for help.

scenes.heading: 99 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 99 99
scenes.summary: Toros nearly hits a child in the street while distracted by the commotion on his car speaker, slamming on his brakes at the last second.

scenes.heading: 100 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 100 100
scenes.summary: Igor asks Garnik to tie Ani's legs with a lamp cord; when Garnik approaches, Ani kicks him in the face, breaking his nose and sending him crashing through the glass coffee table.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS A101
scenes.summary: Garnik stumbles into the kitchen and opens the freezer.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS B101
scenes.summary: Ani tells Igor she won't fight or run and asks him to let her go because he's hurting her, but Igor refuses.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS C101
scenes.summary: Garnik takes a bag of frozen dumplings from the freezer.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS D101
scenes.summary: Ani warns Igor that cameras recorded everything and he's in trouble, but Igor doesn't reply.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 101 101
scenes.summary: Toros lays on the horn and pounds the steering wheel in frustration while speeding down the Belt Parkway.

scenes.heading: 102 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 102 102
scenes.summary: Ani tells Igor that Ivan will see what they did to her, but Igor points out that Ivan left her; Garnik enters with the dumpling bag on his face and tells Toros they have a situation.

scenes.heading: 104 EXT. MANSION - SECURITY GATE - DAY 104 104
scenes.summary: Toros speeds up to the mansion gate and demands the guard open it immediately.

scenes.heading: 105 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 105 105
scenes.summary: Ani insults Igor and accuses him of getting off on restraining her, while Igor insists he doesn't like it and isn't being paid enough.

scenes.heading: 106 EXT. MANSION - DRIVEWAY - DAY 106 106
scenes.summary: Toros exits the Escalade, scans his card, and pushes open the mansion door.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. MANSION - FIRST FLOOR - DAY 107 107
scenes.summary: Toros enters the destroyed mansion to find Garnik with a dumpling bag on his face, Igor restraining Ani on the couch, and no Ivan; after learning Ivan ran away on foot and Ani broke Garnik's nose, Toros interrogates Ani about the marriage, she insists it's real and they had sex, Toros offers her ten thousand dollars to annul it, and Ani refuses and demands one million dollars.
scenes.turningPointNote: Toros discovers the full extent of the disaster and Ani reveals the marriage was consummated, making annulment legally complicated; Ani's demand for a million dollars establishes her as a formidable opponent rather than a victim.

scenes.heading: 108 EXT. MANSION - PATIO - MOMENTS LATER 108 108
scenes.summary: Toros smokes outside while on the phone threatening to cut ties with a law firm unless they get in front of a judge first thing in the morning, before the Zakharovs land at noon.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 109 109
scenes.summary: Ani sits bound and gagged on the couch while Igor stands guard and tells her to do what they say because it will be easier.

scenes.heading: 110 EXT. MANSION - PATIO - DAY 110 110
scenes.summary: Toros confirms a 9 a.m. meeting on the phone, looks at Ani through the glass, and tells his associate in Armenian it's time to break her.

scenes.heading: 111 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - MOMENTS LATER 111 111
scenes.summary: Igor removes Ani's gag and Toros offers her ten thousand dollars for the annulment, claiming Ivan betrayed everyone; Ani refuses, insists the marriage is real because they had sex, and demands one million dollars or she'll go to the press.

scenes.heading: 112 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - DAY 112 112
scenes.summary: Ani removes her false lashes, washes her face in the bathroom, and asks Igor for privacy while she changes, but he waits outside the door.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. MANSION - FRONT STEPS/DRIVEWAY - DAY 113 113
scenes.summary: Ani and the crew exit the mansion and walk to the Escalade; Toros examines Ani's license and calls her Anora, which she corrects to Ani, while Igor listens and cleaning workers arrive at the property.

scenes.heading: 114 EXT. MANSION/INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY - CONTINUOUS 114 114
scenes.summary: Igor gets in the backseat with Ani despite her protests; Toros tells the arriving cleaning crew they have a big mess inside and hands them money as he backs out of the driveway.

scenes.heading: 115 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 115 115
scenes.summary: Ani tells Toros that Ivan hangs out at a vape shop owned or managed by his friends; Garnik complains about needing hospital care for his concussion while Toros refuses, and Igor apologizes to Ani for the earlier violence.

scenes.heading: EXT. BRIGHTWATER - DAY A116
scenes.summary: Igor exits a building and gives Garnik three pills, which Garnik takes all at once before Toros drives off.

scenes.heading: 116 EXT. WEST 10TH ST. - DAY 116 116
scenes.summary: The Escalade is blocked by NYPD barricades on West 10th Street; Toros parks and the crew exits to walk, passing the Cyclone rollercoaster.

scenes.heading: 117 OMITTED 117 117
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 118 EXT. CONEY ISLAND BOARDWALK - DAY 118 118
scenes.summary: The crew walks onto the Coney Island boardwalk and heads toward the vape shop.

scenes.heading: 119 INT. VAPE SHOP - DAY 119 119
scenes.summary: The crew enters the vape shop and asks Crystal and Tom about Ivan; Tom refuses to cooperate and demands to know who they are, Toros becomes aggressive, Ani asks Crystal to call Ivan but Crystal questions why Ani can't call him herself, and when Crystal finally calls Ivan he hangs up immediately.

scenes.heading: 120 EXT. BOARDWALK - MOMENTS LATER 120 120
scenes.summary: The crew exits onto the boardwalk where Ani is upset about being hung up on; Toros decides they will walk to the next location despite protests from Ani and Garnik.

scenes.heading: 121 EXT. TATIANA’S GRILL - DAY 121 121
scenes.summary: The crew arrives at Tatiana's Grill.

scenes.heading: 122 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - DAY 122 122
scenes.summary: The crew enters Tatiana's Grill and spots Aleks in the kitchen; they storm toward him causing a scene.

scenes.heading: 123 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - KITCHEN - DAY - CONTINUOUS 123 123
scenes.summary: The crew confronts Aleks in the kitchen about Ivan's whereabouts; Toros demands Aleks call Ivan, snatches the phone when the call goes to voicemail, and threatens Aleks before storming out when Aleks insists he doesn't know where Ivan is.

scenes.heading: 124 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - MAIN AREA - CONTINUOUS 124 124
scenes.summary: Toros grabs the microphone from a performer and announces to the entire restaurant that they're looking for a missing person, showing Ivan's photo to all the customers in both English and Russian, but nobody has seen him.

scenes.heading: INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS A125
scenes.summary: Aleks tells Ani that Ivan couldn't be with Dasha because she left for the Bahamas with another man after breaking up with Aleks, blaming Ani's marriage for ruining her own relationship expectations.

scenes.heading: 125 EXT. BOARDWALK - LATE AFTERNOON 125 125
scenes.summary: The crew exits Tatiana's into cold wind; Ani refuses to walk all the way back and suggests Toros get the car, but Toros insists they all walk together before it gets dark.

scenes.heading: 126 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH/CONEY ISLAND BOARDWALK - MINUTES LATER 126 126
scenes.summary: Igor offers Ani the red scarf from earlier to keep warm; Ani stops walking and demands to know why he brought it, realizing it was intended to gag her, and refuses to take it.

scenes.heading: 127 EXT. WEST 10TH ST. - LATER 127 127
scenes.summary: The crew discovers the Escalade being attached to a tow truck; Toros and Garnik argue with the driver and physically try to stop the tow, the driver threatens to call police, Toros shoves everyone into the car and speeds away with the front end still elevated.

scenes.heading: 128 INT. ESCALADE - CONTINUOUS 128 128
scenes.summary: Toros drives under subway tracks and checks the rearview mirror, laughing in triumph that nothing will stop him from finding Ivan as they speed onto the Belt Parkway.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. BELT PARKWAY - DUSK 129 129
scenes.summary: The Escalade travels along the Belt Parkway at dusk as Toros vows to find Ivan if it takes all night.

scenes.heading: 130 I/E. BRIGHTON BEACH RESTAURANTS - NIGHT 130 130
scenes.summary: The crew searches multiple Brighton Beach, Coney Island, and Sheepshead Bay restaurants and bars in a montage, showing Ivan's photo to staff and regulars with no success.

scenes.heading: 131 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - NIGHT 131 131
scenes.summary: Igor touches Ani's coat and asks if it's real mink; Ani confirms it's real sable worth more than mink and tells him not to touch it again.

scenes.heading: 132 I/E. BRIGHTON BEACH - NIGHT 132 132
scenes.summary: The crew continues searching Russian restaurants and one manager reports that Ivan ate there an hour ago, giving Toros hope.

scenes.heading: INT. RUSSIAN BATH HOUSE - NIGHT A133
scenes.summary: The crew enters a Russian bath house and shows Ivan's photo to customers with no luck; after a pause, Ani suggests Ivan might be at gaming locations.

scenes.heading: 133 OMITTED 133 133
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 134 OMITTED 134 134
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 135 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH/CONEY ISLAND - NIGHT 135 135
scenes.summary: The crew searches an internet cafe and a billiards hall with no success while Garnik waits in the car barely functioning.

scenes.heading: 136 INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT 136 136
scenes.summary: Garnik suddenly vomits in the Escalade causing Toros to slam on the brakes, creating chaos with cars behind them honking and screaming as Toros pulls to the side of the road.

scenes.heading: 138 EXT. BROOKLYN GAS STATION - NIGHT 138 138
scenes.summary: Toros cleans the vomit from the car interior while arguing with Igor about the Oxycodone; he yells at Ani and Igor for smoking near the gas pump, and they move away in awkward silence.

scenes.heading: 139 INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT 139 139
scenes.summary: Toros asks Ani which clubs she went to with Ivan so they can search them all.

scenes.heading: 140 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH - VARIOUS CLUBS - NIGHT 140 140
scenes.summary: The crew searches multiple Brighton Beach clubs showing Ivan's photo to staff; at every location they learn Ivan was there but left recently, always staying one step behind him on his bar crawl.

scenes.heading: 141 INT. DINER - BROOKLYN - NIGHT 141 141
scenes.summary: The exhausted crew sits in a diner late at night; Toros despairs that he's fucked with only six hours until City Hall, Ani asks Igor for Oxycodone, and they argue about Igor being a gopnik while Toros lectures about their entitled generation.

scenes.heading: 142 INT. HEADQUARTERS - MAIN ROOM - NIGHT 142 142
scenes.summary: Ivan, drunk and wearing sunglasses, walks through Headquarters strip club past Diamond and Jenny, who recognize him and exchange knowing looks.

scenes.heading: 143 INT. DINER - NIGHT 143 143
scenes.summary: Toros stands lecturing the table about their generation being entitled babies with no respect, ambition, or goals.

scenes.heading: 144 INT. HEADQUARTERS - LOCKER ROOM - NIGHT 144 144
scenes.summary: Diamond excitedly tells Lulu and other dancers that Ani's billionaire husband just arrived looking for action; she prepares herself and declares the marriage must already be failing.

scenes.heading: 145 INT. DINER - NIGHT 145 145
scenes.summary: Ani reads a text on her phone and announces that Ivan is at Headquarters strip club, interrupting Toros's rant.
scenes.turningPointNote: The crew finally locates Ivan after hours of searching, shifting from desperate hunt to confrontation.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT A146
scenes.summary: Ivan does shots at the bar with two girls flanking him as Diamond approaches from behind and pushes her way next to him.

scenes.heading: 146 INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 146 146
scenes.summary: Diamond grinds on Ivan's lap and confirms his identity as he smiles drunkenly.

scenes.heading: 147 EXT. DINER - NIGHT 147 147
scenes.summary: The crew rushes across the diner parking lot to the Escalade with Ani complaining about ketchup on her sable coat.

scenes.heading: 148 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - NIGHT 148 148
scenes.summary: Ani complains about the lingering vomit smell as they tear out of the parking lot racing toward Headquarters.

scenes.heading: 149 EXT. BQE - NIGHT 149 149
scenes.summary: The Escalade races through the night on the BQE.

scenes.heading: 150 INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT 150 150
scenes.summary: Diamond continues the lap dance as Ivan throws down hundreds and she suggests moving to a private room upstairs.

scenes.heading: 151 EXT. BROOKLYN BATTERY TUNNEL - NIGHT 151 151
scenes.summary: The crew drives through the Brooklyn Battery Tunnel.

scenes.heading: 152 EXT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 152 152
scenes.summary: The crew arrives at Headquarters, jumps out of the Escalade, and races inside.

scenes.heading: 153 INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 153 153
scenes.summary: The crew storms through Headquarters as Lulu tells Ani that Ivan is upstairs in a private room with Diamond; they rush up the stairs calling Ivan's name and begin opening doors in the private room hallway.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS PRIVATE ROOM - CONTINUOUS A154
scenes.summary: The crew bursts into the private room where Diamond is with Ivan; Toros orders Diamond out and Ivan to stay, Ani desperately tries to talk to Ivan explaining she was tied up and gagged, but Ivan laughs and drunkenly dismisses everything saying his parents will fix it and he's going back to Russia, then Toros physically drags him out of the room.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan's complete rejection of Ani and the marriage is revealed — he never intended to fight for it and plans to return to Russia, shattering Ani's hopes.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS B154
scenes.summary: Jenny walks through the kitchen and leans into the office to alert someone.

scenes.heading: 154 INT. HEADQUARTERS - OFFICE - CONTINUOUS 154 154
scenes.summary: Jenny tells Jimmy that Ani is causing a scene with three goons, and Jimmy asks if it's Russian Ani.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM / THROUGH CLUB - CONTINUOUS 155.1
scenes.summary: Toros drags Ivan out by the collar threatening him while Ani tries to tell Ivan she loves him; Diamond follows them through the club hurling insults at Ani, mocking her for bragging about the marriage and revealing that Ivan told her he was going back to Russia and just wanted one last bang.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - STAIRS - CONTINUOUS 155.2
scenes.summary: The group descends the stairs with Diamond aggressively following and insulting Ani; Garnik warns Diamond not to mess with Ani by pointing to his broken nose, but Diamond threatens Ani to never come back without her protectors.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - MAIN FLOOR / FRONT ENTRANCE - CONTINUOUS 155.3
scenes.summary: Diamond continues taunting Ani about calling the marriage's failure, saying it lasted two weeks; Ani suddenly turns and tackles Diamond to the floor in a full brawl as Igor, Garnik, Jimmy, Dawn, and security try to break up the chaotic fight.

scenes.heading: EXT. HEADQUARTERS - 552 W. 38TH ST. - NIGHT A156
scenes.summary: Toros loads everyone into the Escalade, shoving Ivan into the back between Garnik and Igor, and pushing Ani into the front seat.

scenes.heading: INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS B156
scenes.summary: Ani desperately tries to make Ivan understand they're being forced into divorce while he remains unresponsive and passed out, and Toros tells her the deal is she takes 10K and walks away.

scenes.heading: 156 EXT. COURTHOUSE - CENTER STREET - NIGHT 156 156
scenes.summary: The Escalade parks in front of the courthouse and Toros announces they will wait, while Ani stares out the window looking lost.

scenes.heading: 157 EXT. COURTHOUSE - CENTER STREET - MORNING 157 157
scenes.summary: Morning arrives and Toros wakes everyone up; Ani tells the still-intoxicated Ivan not to worry because she's going to handle this.

scenes.heading: 158 EXT. COURTHOUSE - DAY 158 158
scenes.summary: Toros instructs Garnik to stay with the car, then leads the group up the courthouse steps where attorney Michael Sharnov greets them and notes the judge has bumped them up on the schedule.

scenes.heading: 159 INT. COURTHOUSE - ROTUNDA - DAY 159 159
scenes.summary: Sharnov expresses concern in Russian about Ivan being inebriated and risks to his license, but Toros threatens his continued employment with the Zakharov family to force compliance.

scenes.heading: 160 INT. COURTHOUSE - COURTROOM - LATER 160 160
scenes.summary: In court, when Sharnov files for annulment claiming duress, Ani loudly objects with profanity, causing the judge to threaten disorderly conduct charges and ultimately order them to return when they can be civil.
scenes.turningPointNote: The annulment attempt fails in court due to Ani's outburst, forcing them to find another solution and revealing the marriage cannot be easily erased.

scenes.heading: 161 OMITTED 161 161
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 162 EXT. COURTHOUSE - STEPS - DAY 162 162
scenes.summary: On the courthouse steps, Toros has a breakdown realizing they got married in Vegas not New York, making annulment impossible here, and he weeps believing he's ruined as the parents arrive in two hours.

scenes.heading: EXT. TORO’S ESCALADE - DAY A163
scenes.summary: Toros tears Garnik out of the driver's seat and tells him they got married in Vegas, then the crew piles in and drives away.

scenes.heading: 163 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 163 163
scenes.summary: They drive in tense silence with Toros crying until Ivan suddenly vomits on himself, causing Igor and Garnik to freak out while Toros barely reacts and they all lower their windows.

scenes.heading: 164 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - DAY 164 164
scenes.summary: The Escalade drives onto the private airport property and parks in front of the hangar entrance.

scenes.heading: 165 OMITTED 165 165
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 166 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TARMAC - DAY 166 166
scenes.summary: The Zakharov private jet lands and Toros greets Nikolai and Galina on the tarmac, telling Nikolai he has more bad news that he won't be happy about.

scenes.heading: 167 INT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TERMINAL - DAY 167 167
scenes.summary: Galina storms into the terminal and confronts the drunk, vomit-stained Ivan in Russian, calling him disgusting and saying he's disgraced the family, while Ani slowly approaches them.

scenes.heading: 168 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TARMAC - DAY 168 168
scenes.summary: Galina drags Ivan toward the plane at a swift pace calling everyone idiots, and when Ani calls out to Ivan twice he finally turns and confirms yes, they're getting divorced, then boards the plane.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan directly confirms to Ani that they are getting divorced, abandoning her and shattering any remaining hope she had for their marriage.

scenes.heading: INT. PLANE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ivan boards the plane and takes his seat while Galina asks where Ani is.

scenes.heading: EXT. TARMAC - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Galina descends the steps and orders Ani to board, but Ani refuses and threatens to sue for half without a prenup, prompting Galina to threaten that doing so will destroy Ani's life and the lives of her family and friends.

scenes.heading: 169 INT. GULFSTREAM G650 - DAY 169 169
scenes.summary: Mid-flight on the lavish private jet, the exhausted crew sits in separate areas while Ivan's parents relentlessly reprimand him; Igor pours two vodka shots, Ani takes hers before he can toast, and they sit in silence.

scenes.heading: 170 EXT. AIRPORT - LAS VEGAS - LATE MORNING 170 170
scenes.summary: The group gets into two black SUVs on the Las Vegas airport tarmac.

scenes.heading: 171 I/E. SUV - DAY 171 171
scenes.summary: They drive through Las Vegas in the SUVs.

scenes.heading: 172 EXT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - PARKING LOT - DAY 172 172
scenes.summary: The SUVs pull into the parking lot of a rapid divorce center and park in front.

scenes.heading: 173 INT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - DAY 173 173
scenes.summary: At the divorce center, Ivan signs the annulment papers without hesitation; when Igor suggests Ivan should apologize to Ani, Galina refuses and says her son won't apologize to anyone.
scenes.turningPointNote: The marriage is officially dissolved as Ivan signs the papers without a second thought, finalizing Ani's loss and humiliation.

scenes.heading: 174 EXT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - DAY 174 174
scenes.summary: Outside the divorce center, Toros gives Igor instructions and a car key and bank card, telling him to take Ani to the airport and that she can stay at the house one night but must leave in the morning, and Igor will get her money when the bank opens.

scenes.heading: 175 I/E. SUV - DAY 175 175
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor drive through Las Vegas to the airport in complete silence.

scenes.heading: 176 INT. COMMERCIAL AIRPLANE - DAY 176 176
scenes.summary: On a cramped domestic flight back, Ani sleeps while a baby cries and Igor covers her with his jacket as the captain announces landing preparations.

scenes.heading: 177 EXT. LAGUARDIA AIRPORT - CURB - DUSK 177 177
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor take a taxi from LaGuardia Airport at sunset.

scenes.heading: 178 INT. MANSION - MASTER BATHROOM - NIGHT 178 178
scenes.summary: Ani takes a shower in the mansion's master bathroom and while drying off, looks around the gorgeous space thinking it was nice while it lasted.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVINGROOM - NIGHT 178A
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor smoke a blunt together on the couch in silence; Igor reveals it was his birthday yesterday and he turned 30, then tells Ani he likes the name Anora better than Ani, leading to banter where she insults him and he asks what her name means, but she says she doesn't know.

scenes.heading: 180 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - NEXT MORNING 180 180
scenes.summary: Ani wakes up in the master bedroom to snow falling outside creating a winter wonderland, then packs her belongings including clothes, photo frames, and toiletries.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVINGROOM - LATER A181
scenes.summary: Igor slowly wakes up on the couch and sees the falling snow outside.

scenes.heading: 181 INT. MANSION - FOYER/DOORWAY - LATER 181 181
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor wheel out her three large pieces of luggage through the mansion foyer and open the door to see it's snowing.

scenes.heading: 182 EXT. BANK - DAY - LATER 182 182
scenes.summary: At the bank, Igor and Ani complete the money transfer with a teller while snow continues falling outside.

scenes.heading: 183 EXT. ANI’S APARTMENT/INT. IGOR’S CAR - DAY 183 183
scenes.summary: Parked in front of Ani's apartment in heavy snow, Igor secretly gives Ani back the ring she cut his face with, then brings her luggage to the porch; when he returns and finds she hasn't exited, he gets back in and they smoke cigarettes together in silence.

scenes.heading: 184 EXT. ANI’S APARTMENT/BROOKLYN STREET - DAY 184 184
scenes.summary: Snow continues to fall around the idling car outside Ani's Brooklyn apartment.
